step_rationale: Monocyte/macrophage adhesion and dendritic cell recruitment; integrin-mediated inflammation.
mechanism: CD11c (αX integrin) mediates monocyte adhesion and inflammatory cell recruitment to the destabilized plaque during atherothrombotic MI.

references.title: On-chip phenotypic analysis of inflammatory monocytes in atherogenesis and myocardial infarction.
references.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences of the United States of America
